name: /pr-corpus-update rejects a budget override value that is non-numeric or negative
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --budget-override -1 --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_budget_override' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
